main.title: ln(Real ZHVI) on LOMR Treatment
notes: Zip and county×year fixed effects.
Standard errors clustered at county level.
Reference period: 12-0 months before LOMR (τ = -1).
Already-treated zips (LOMR before 2009) excluded.
(1) No controls. (2) Unemployment rate, NFIP policies. (3) Adds avg premium, claims.

intensity.title: ln(Real ZHVI) on LOMR × Policy Intensity
notes: Zip and county×year FE. SE clustered at county level.
Intensity = pre-LOMR NFIP policies / population.

updown.title: ln(Real ZHVI) on Upzoning vs Downzoning
notes: Zip and county×year FE. SE clustered at county level.
Each spec uses its treated subsample + all never-treated controls.
Risk direction classified by SFHA zone share change (±1pp threshold).

insurance.title: ln(NFIP Policies) on LOMR Treatment
notes: Zip and county×year FE. SE clustered at county level.
Policies: NFIP policy count (mechanism). Claims: falsification.
Reference period: τ = -1 (12-0 months before LOMR).

disclosure.title: ln(Real ZHVI) on LOMR × Disclosure
notes: Zip and county×year FE. SE clustered at county level.
ebin = binary LOMR effect (non-disclosure states).
dbin/dbinb = differential effect in disclosure states.
Strict: CA, IL, IN, LA, MS, OR, SC, TX, WI. Broad adds FL, VA, NC, NY.

intensity_quartiles.title: ln(Real ZHVI) by Policy Intensity Quartile
notes: Zip and county×year FE. SE clustered at county level.
Quartiles based on pre-LOMR NFIP policy penetration.
Q1 = lowest penetration, Q4 = highest.

republican.title: ln(Real ZHVI) on Policy Intensity × Political Lean
notes: Zip and county×year FE. SE clustered at county level.
Intensity = pre-LOMR NFIP policies / population.
Rep = 1 if county above-median Republican two-party vote share (2020).

updown_intensity.title: ln(Real ZHVI) on Signed LOMR × Policy Intensity
notes: Zip and county×year FE. SE clustered at county level.
Signed intensity separates upzoned (risk ↑) and downzoned (risk ↓) LOMRs.

robustness.title: ln(Real ZHVI) on LOMR (Robustness)
notes: Zip and county×year FE. SE clustered at county level.
(1) Main (weighted): baseline specification with population weights.
(2) Unweighted: no population weights.
(3) Geographic intensity: LOMR area / ZCTA area ratio.

twfe.title: ln(Real ZHVI) on LOMR (TWFE DiD)
notes: Zip and county×year FE. SE clustered at county level.
